_meta.provenance: Public domain (U.S. federal government work, 17 U.S.C. 105)
_meta.note: Summaries are representative excerpts of public CMS coverage language, cached so Track 1 requires no live CMS API call. Full determinations are linked via full_text_url.

ncds.title: Anesthesia in Cataract / Routine Pre-Operative Determinations
ncds.summary: Routine pre-operative medical evaluation is covered when medically necessary and supports the surgical determination. National policy sets the federal floor; contractor LCDs supply procedure-specific clinical criteria.

ncds.title: Total Knee Arthroplasty — No National Coverage Determination
ncds.summary: There is no NCD for major joint replacement (CPT 27447). In the absence of a national determination, coverage is governed by local contractor LCDs and individual payer medical policy. Agents must therefore consult both the LCD layer and the payer overlay; the federal floor alone is silent.

ncds.title: Electrical Nerve Stimulators
ncds.summary: Covers electrical nerve stimulation for chronic intractable pain when conservative therapy has been tried and failed. Establishes a federal conservative-therapy prerequisite that payer overlays may extend with duration requirements.

ncds.title: Evaluation and Management Office Visit — Federal Coverage
ncds.summary: Established-patient office/outpatient evaluation and management visits (CPT 99213) are covered when medically necessary. No prior authorization is required at the federal level for routine E/M services.
